events.label: reasoning
events.text: 我们被要求输出JSON。场景：锁具/标签检查，发现“lock without tag / tag without lock”。这是在进行中的锁具/挂牌工作。参考OSHA 1910.147。根据OSHA 1910.147，锁具/挂牌程序要求每个能源隔离点都要有锁和标签，标签标明谁锁的、为什么锁等。如果发现锁无标签或标签无锁，这是违反程序，可能导致危险能量意外释放。因此，这是严重的不符合项，应该立即停止工作，直到纠正。所以decision应该是fail，risk至少high或critical。工作阶段是in-progress。component_conditions应该是["non-compliant"]，因为锁具/挂牌程序不合规。percent_complete可能估计，比如30%。value无。order可能不需要。findings: "Lock without tag or tag without lock observed; LOTO procedure violation." actions: "Stop work immediately, install missing lock or tag, verify all energy isolation points, and re-inspect before resuming." rationale: "OSHA 1910.147 requires that each energy isolation point be secured with a lock and a tag identifying the authorized employee. Missing lock or tag compromises safety." references: ["OSHA 1910.147(c)(5)(ii)(D)", "OSHA 1910.147(c)(7)(i)"]。另外，我们还需要填写confidence，比如0.95。event_time和rate不适用，可设为0。order和workable可能不需要，但可设为空。sound_source可能空字符串。根据schema，返回所有这些字段。我们给出具体的JSON。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 30,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Lock without tag or tag without lock observed on energy isolation point",
    "LOTO procedure violation per OSHA 1910.147"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work and notify affected employees",
    "Verify and correct all lockout/tagout devices: ensure each isolation point has both a lock and a tag",
    "Retrain involved personnel on proper LOTO procedures before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 requires each energy isolation point to be secured with a lock and a tag identifying the authorized employee. A missing lock or tag defeats the safety system and could lead to accidental re-energization.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(5)(ii)(D)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(7)(i)"
  ]
}
